pi_items.source: setup_nosh.sh: User inserted with username='demo_provider', displayname='Dr. James Carter', group_id=2 (provider role)
setup_task.sh: Patient created with firstname='Maria' if not found in demographics table. DOB hardcoded as 1978-06-14.
setup_task.sh: Patient created with lastname='Rodriguez'. Not present in pre-loaded patients.sql; created on-demand by task setup.
task.json description (line 5) and export_result.sh SQL query (line 37: WHERE m.subject LIKE '%URGENT%'). Verifier checks line 20 and 74.
task.json description (line 6: 'Lab called. Potassium 6.2. Please advise.') and export_result.sh SQL query (line 38: WHERE m.body LIKE '%6.2%'). Verifier checks line 21 and 78.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves sending a secure message in NOSH ChartingSystem (real open-source EHR software) to recipient 'demo_provider' (Dr. James Carter, user ID 2, provider group) regarding patient Maria Rodriguez (synthetic patient, DOB 1978-06-14, auto-created if not found). The message must contain the subject keyword 'URGENT' and body keyword '6.2' (potassium lab value). All metadata values match the verified values from setup scripts and database configurations. The data is synthetic, generated from Synthea patient data and task-specific test fixtures.
